name: rhino
description: Connect Codex to a local Rhino MCP server running on this computer.

interface.shortDescription: Use a local Rhino MCP server from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to a Rhino MCP server running locally so it can create geometry, inspect the scene, and drive Rhino workflows.
defaultPrompt: Create a box at the origin in Rhino.
List the objects in the current Rhino file.
Capture a viewport image from Rhino.
